issues.description: Architecture docs still state that server directly imports `socket/internal/types.ts`, but that file was deleted and server imports now point at `src/features/space/protocol/internal/socket-events.ts`. The runtime/import graph is correct; this is a stale SSOT pointer in an updated architecture spec.
issues.recommendation: Update this line to name `protocol/internal/socket-events.ts` for socket event types, while keeping `chat/internal/chat-constants.ts` only for the remaining DEFAULT_NICKNAME server usage if needed.
